case_title: SALLY GATI VS. GORDON M. STEEL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GATI, SALLY AS TO DEFENDANT STEEL, GORDON M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY GATI, SALLY STEEL, GORDON M.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATI, SALLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEEL, GORDON M. $6,685.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,760.00, $6,685.00 FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING AND MEDICAL BILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STEEL, GORDON M.
